title: Super Mario 64
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Platformer game.

A small agile explorer running forward in a rounded toy-like 3D course with grassy slopes, chunky stone ledges, and a distant tower doorway, mid-stride on a clear route toward the landmark.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- Nintendo 64 aesthetic, colorful stylized 3D, playful volume, and rounded readable shapes
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- playful, bright, adventurous

Composition:
- single explorer only, one readable route, rounded hills, no abstract block maze
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Mario likeness, avoid mustache and hat codes, avoid official mushrooms or stars, avoid abstract geometry-first compositions, avoid resemblance to mario. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Mario likeness, avoid mustache and hat codes, avoid official mushrooms or stars, avoid abstract geometry-first compositions, avoid resemblance to mario
revised_prompt: Create a delightful image inspired by retro platformer games, featuring a lone, agile explorer running towards a distant tower doorway situated within a scenic, rounded 3D course. The course should boast grassy slopes and chunky stone ledges. Style should evoke a Nintendo 64 aesthetic: playful volumes and rounded, recognizable shapes expressed in a limited, vibrant color palette. This fresh, modern interpretation of the retro aesthetic should steer clear from clutter, ensuring the focal point remains only on the explorer and the clear path ahead of him. Consistent with the playful, bright, and adventurous mood, the image must not contain any text, watermark, or imitative designs, and importantly, the explorer should not resemble any identifiable characters.
